creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
russian/MT Source file is not available

Fix: 

COMMENT=	Russian localization of the MovableType publishing system
+BROKEN=		Source file is not available

 PROJECTHOST=	movabletype
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../www/${PORTNAME}
--- ru-MT.diff ends here -----Iis0XjjbsFFXbuAmHddGpxD1xIOYeaQ5lSRJd2uaw6rh2wwA
Content-Type: text/plain; name="MT.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="MT.diff"

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/MT/Makefile www/MT/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/MT/Makefile	2010-07-02 22:45:27.000000000 +0900
+++ www/MT/Makefile	2010-09-09 13:17:12.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	MT
-PORTVERSION?=	5.02
+PORTVERSION?=	5.03
 CATEGORIES?=	www
-MASTER_SITES?=	http://www.movabletype.org/downloads/stable/
+MASTER_SITES?=	http://movabletype.org/downloads/stable/
 DISTNAME?=	MTOS-${PORTVERSION}-en

 MAINTAINER?=	ports@FreeBSD.org
